markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Q4 performance and align on the 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy Approved:** A 4-lane strategy was approved to drive organic growth. It includes a thought leadership bet (Lane 1), a proven tool evaluation lane (Lane 2), a how-to/AI visibility lane (Lane 3A), and a rapid trend-capture lane (Lane 3B).](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [**MCP Lane Paused:** The proposed MCP (Multi-Agent Capability) lane (Lane 4) is paused. Sylvain questioned its viability against established competitors (e.g., CloudMP.com) and suggested pivoting to "plugins/skills" for better product alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Dynamic CTA System Mandated:** A dynamic CTA system is required to replace the current manual process. This system will use Sanity components to programmatically pair content with relevant, high-converting CTAs, enabling rapid, company-wide updates.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Growth Target Set:** The goal is to double organic traffic year-over-year, requiring \~10% month-over-month growth. The stretch goal is 50k weekly visits, with 40k as the acceptable baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)

## Topics

### Q4 Performance & Q1 Recovery

  - [Q4 performance was below OKR targets, but Q1 is pacing much better.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Current Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Weekly Visits:** 36k (last week), up from a 19k average.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [**Signups:** 89 (last week) from GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Primary Growth Drivers:** Content refreshes and the tool evaluation lane.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### 2026 Content Strategy: The Four Lanes

  - [The strategy is rooted in the North Star: "Augment the default AI coding workflow for professional engineers."](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Lane 1: Thought Leadership (New Bet)**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build authority and establish Augment's unique framework, not primarily for traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Method:** An intensive workflow using a knowledge library (e.g., Edwin Chen interviews) to create high-quality, validated articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Action:** Launch a trial of 2–3 articles/week. Emma Webb will coordinate with Amelia (product lead, Intent App) for content input.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Lane 2: Tool Evaluation (Bread & Butter)**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Goal:** Continue the successful "rinse and repeat" model.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Focus:** Expand coverage to tools relevant to Intent App (e.g., CodexApp, Conductor.build).](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Lane 3A: How-to Guides (High-Intent)**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high-intent search traffic and build authority for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Method:** Create evergreen guides on specific topics, linking to relevant product CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Lane 3B: Trend Capture (Big Bet)**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Goal:** Rapidly publish content on new tools to capture early SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Method:** High-volume output (\~30 pieces/week) with low individual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

### Lane 4: MCP Strategy (Paused)

  - [**Proposal:** A lane for Multi-Agent Capability (MCP) content.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [**Concern:** Sylvain questioned the viability of competing with established platforms like CloudMP.com (240k skills).](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Decision:** The lane is paused. Liz will re-evaluate the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Suggestion:** Pivot to "plugins/skills" to align with a newer, higher-level abstraction that Augment's products already support.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

### Metrics & Goals

  - [**Primary Goal:** Double organic traffic year-over-year (\~10% MoM growth).](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
  - [**Weekly Targets:** Stretch: 50k visits; Baseline: 40k visits.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [**Key Conversion Metric:** "Download Intent" event in Posthog.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [**AIO Tracking:** Liz will propose a "health metric" to track weekly progress on AI Optimization, providing a short-term feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
      - [Propose the dynamic CTA system (Sanity components) for next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2764.0)
      - [Re-evaluate the MCP lane strategy, considering the "plugins/skills" pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
      - [Propose a health metric for tracking AIO progress.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)
      - [Coordinate with Emma Webb on the thought leadership lane.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
      - [Provide messaging artifacts from the upcoming SKO to Liz for content reuse.](https://fathom.video/share/_cYvS_zyjR8pPXMh1e4hB9r28CyyP7Fn?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
